title: Baotou, Inner Mongolia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Baotou, Inner Mongolia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Baotou is a city in Inner Mongolia with a population of 2,709,000. A major industrial city in Inner Mongolia, known for its rare earth mining, steel production, and vast grasslands nearby.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
